name: The Growing Place School
notes: School has a public 'School Calendar' page at https://www.thegrowingplace.school/school-calendar but the page was not reachable from this environment (outbound fetch to the school's domain was blocked by network allowlist). Search-engine snippets did not expose specific dates. Founded 1963 as ministry of First United Methodist Church of Coral Gables; 275 students PK-5. Recommend direct call to (305) 446-0846 or email via their site to obtain the 2025-26 and 2026-27 closure dates. IMPORTANT anchor school - highest priority to re-verify once domain is reachable.

name: Gulliver Preparatory School

Could not fetch directly from this environment. Search snippets suggest first day of school Aug 14, 2025 but the snippet was not a verbatim quote of the school's own page - mark as pending until PDF is read.
